title: Item Replicator
description: This mod adds two tools to Minecraft: Ordinary Item Replicator and Advanced Item Replicator.
body:
### 📦 Mod Introduction: Item Replicator

**Author: DY_XiaoJiaZi**  
This mod adds two tools to Minecraft: **Ordinary Item Replicator** and **Advanced Item Replicator**.

#### 🔧 How to Use
- Hold the target item in one hand and the replicator in the other.
- **Right-click** in the air. The replicator is consumed and produces one exact copy of the target item (regardless of stack size).

#### 🧩 Differences
- **Ordinary**: Cannot copy enchanted items, netherite items (including ancient debris), or the Advanced Replicator.
- **Advanced**: Can copy any item! Enchantments, durability, custom names – all preserved.
- **Advanced**: Not only that, it also supports light and shadow
#### 🎨 Other Features
- Creative tab with Advanced Replicator icon.
- Bilingual tooltips (Chinese/English); "Copy failed" on failure.
- Recipes:  
  - Ordinary: 8 iron blocks in a ring (center empty).  
  - Advanced: 8 gold blocks surrounding one Ordinary Replicator.
